category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to South Sudan.

title.en: China-to-South Sudan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入南苏丹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入南蘇丹：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against South Sudan SSNBS / SSEC requirements, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC references, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与南苏丹SSNBS / SSEC要求、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC参考、230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與南蘇丹SSNBS / SSEC要求、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC參考、230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering South Sudan, the practical gaps should be framed honestly as an early-market, project-led compliance question. South Sudan's formal standards capacity through SSNBS is nascent, electricity supply is limited and often diesel or off-grid, and SSEC or the site power owner will be central to any grid or microgrid connection. The technical baseline is 230/400 V at 50 Hz: frequency aligns with China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so input range, protection thresholds, metering, thermal design, and derating must be validated. IEC Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC should be treated as the IEC-aligned direction, not Americas J1772 / CCS1. GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 China-only charger designs are not connector or protocol substitutes.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入南苏丹时，应如实将其视为早期市场、项目主导的合规问题。南苏丹通过SSNBS建立的正式标准能力仍处于初期，电力供应覆盖率很低且常依赖柴油或离网系统，SSEC或场站电力业主将是任何电网或微网接入的关键方。技术基线为230/400 V、50 Hz：频率与中国一致，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V，因此须验证输入范围、保护阈值、计量、热设计和降额。交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2应视为IEC体系方向，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1。仅按中国GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930设计的充电桩不能替代目标接口或协议。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入南蘇丹時，應如實將其視為早期市場、項目主導的合規問題。南蘇丹通過SSNBS建立的正式標準能力仍處於初期，電力供應覆蓋率很低且常依賴柴油或離網系統，SSEC或場站電力業主將是任何電網或微網接入的關鍵方。技術基線為230/400 V、50 Hz：頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V，因此須驗證輸入範圍、保護閾值、計量、熱設計和降額。交流IEC Type 2和直流CCS2應視為IEC體系方向，而不是美洲J1772 / CCS1。僅按中國GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930設計的充電樁不能替代目標接口或協議。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SSNBS scope determination, SSEC approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, donor-procurement clearance, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project owners, network operators, and installers should verify current South Sudan standards, utility connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and site power conditions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SSNBS适用范围裁定、SSEC批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、援助项目采购许可或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目业主、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行南苏丹标准、公用事业接入要求、IEC标准版本及场站供电条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SSNBS適用範圍裁定、SSEC批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、援助項目採購許可或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目業主、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行南蘇丹標準、公用事業接入要求、IEC標準版本及場站供電條件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, donor-project document, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
